tasks.subject: Task 0: Set up upstream reference clone
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Have a byte-exact copy of `hollow/dotfiles@5fd2f15` on disk so vendored files can be copied verbatim and diffed.

**Files:**
- Create: `/tmp/hollow-dotfiles` (ephemeral working clone, not part of the repo)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `/tmp/hollow-dotfiles` exists and `git -C /tmp/hollow-dotfiles rev-parse --short HEAD` prints `5fd2f15`.

**Verify:** `git -C /tmp/hollow-dotfiles rev-parse --short HEAD` -> `5fd2f15`

**Steps:**
1. `rm -rf /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git clone -q https://github.com/hollow/dotfiles /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git -C /tmp/hollow-dotfiles checkout -q 5fd2f15`
2. Confirm HEAD is `5fd2f15`. No commit (scratch clone).

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "git -C /tmp/hollow-dotfiles rev-parse --short HEAD", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/tmp/hollow-dotfiles checked out at 5fd2f15"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Add the gnupg section
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Install GnuPG via Homebrew and add upstream's gnupg `.zshrc` block (GPG_TTY, XDG `GNUPGHOME`, gpg-agent plugin).

**Files:**
- Modify: `Brewfile` (add `brew "gnupg"` between `brew "gnu-time"` and `brew "grep"`)
- Modify: `zsh/.zshrc` (insert gnupg block immediately after `alias s="git st ."`, before `# glamour/glow`)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `Brewfile` contains `brew "gnupg"` alphabetically placed between `gnu-time` and `grep`.
- [ ] `zsh/.zshrc` contains the 7-line gnupg block (2 comment + 5 code lines) exactly as upstream, between the git section and the glamour/glow block.
- [ ] Every added `.zshrc` line is byte-identical to a line in `/tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/.zshrc`.
- [ ] `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc` exits 0.

**Verify:** `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && diff <(grep -A6 '^# gnupg: GNU privacy guard' zsh/.zshrc) <(grep -A6 '^# gnupg: GNU privacy guard' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/.zshrc)`

**Steps:**
1. Brewfile: insert `brew "gnupg"` between `brew "gnu-time"` and `brew "grep"`.
2. zsh/.zshrc: after `alias s="git st ."` insert the gnupg block (GPG_TTY, GNUPGHOME, mkdir, chmod, `zi auto wait for OMZP::gpg-agent`).
3. Verify zsh -n and block diff.
4. Commit -> "Ring 5: add gnupg (brew + .zshrc block)".

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Brewfile", "zsh/.zshrc"], "verifyCommand": "zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && diff <(grep -A6 '^# gnupg: GNU privacy guard' zsh/.zshrc) <(grep -A6 '^# gnupg: GNU privacy guard' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/.zshrc)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Brewfile has gnupg between gnu-time and grep", "gnupg .zshrc block byte-identical to upstream, between git and glow", "zsh -n passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add the ssh section
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Vendor upstream's ssh client config, install OpenSSH, and add upstream's ssh `.zshrc` block wiring the 1Password SSH agent with an `OMZP::ssh-agent` fallback - without the `ssu` alias and without the Colima `Include`.

**Files:**
- Create: `ssh/config.crypto` (byte-identical copy from upstream)
- Create: `ssh/.gitignore` (byte-identical copy from upstream)
- Create: `ssh/config` (upstream's, minus the Colima `Include` line)
- Modify: `Brewfile` (add `brew "openssh"` between `brew "neovim"` and `brew "ripgrep"`)
- Modify: `zsh/.zshrc` (insert ssh block immediately after `zi auto wait for OMZP::rsync`, before `# tmux: a terminal multiplexer`)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `ssh/config.crypto` and `ssh/.gitignore` byte-identical to upstream (diff empty).
- [ ] `ssh/config` equals upstream's with exactly one line removed: `Include %d/.config/colima/ssh_config`.
- [ ] `Brewfile` contains `brew "openssh"` between `neovim` and `ripgrep`.
- [ ] `zsh/.zshrc` ssh block (without `alias ssu=...`) sits between the rsync and tmux blocks; every added line except the omitted alias is byte-identical to upstream.
- [ ] `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc` exits 0.

**Verify:** `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && diff ssh/config.crypto /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/ssh/config.crypto && diff ssh/.gitignore /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/ssh/.gitignore && diff <(grep -v 'colima/ssh_config' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/ssh/config) ssh/config`

**Steps:**
1. `mkdir -p ssh && cp /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/ssh/config.crypto ssh/config.crypto && cp /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/ssh/.gitignore ssh/.gitignore`
2. `grep -v '^Include %d/.config/colima/ssh_config$' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/ssh/config > ssh/config` (keep `beind` typo).
3. Brewfile: insert `brew "openssh"` between neovim and ripgrep.
4. zsh/.zshrc: after `zi auto wait for OMZP::rsync` insert the ssh block, OMITTING the `alias ssu=...` line.
5. Verify files, per-line subset of ssh block vs upstream, zsh -n.
6. Commit -> "Ring 5: add ssh (config files, brew, 1Password agent .zshrc block)".

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ssh/config", "ssh/config.crypto", "ssh/.gitignore", "Brewfile", "zsh/.zshrc"], "verifyCommand": "zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && diff ssh/config.crypto /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/ssh/config.crypto && diff ssh/.gitignore /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/ssh/.gitignore && diff <(grep -v 'colima/ssh_config' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/ssh/config) ssh/config", "acceptanceCriteria": ["config.crypto and .gitignore byte-identical to upstream", "ssh/config = upstream minus Colima Include", "Brewfile has openssh between neovim and ripgrep", "ssh .zshrc block (no ssu alias) between rsync and tmux, subset of upstream", "zsh -n passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Faithfulness + Brewfile audit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm the whole ring is a clean subset - no Brewfile deviations, valid Brewfile, valid zsh, and the only `.zshrc`/config deviations are the two intended deletions.

**Files:**
- None (verification only)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `brew bundle list --file=./Brewfile --all` parses and lists `gnupg` and `openssh`.
- [ ] `comm -23` of this repo's `brew`/`cask` lines against upstream's is empty.
- [ ] `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc` exits 0.
- [ ] The only `ssh/config` line removed vs upstream is the Colima `Include`.

**Verify:** the audit bash block -> ends with `AUDIT CLEAN`

**Steps:**
1. Run the audit block (brew bundle list checks; comm -23 deviation check; zsh -n; ssh/config diff) -> `AUDIT CLEAN`.
2. (Optional) Manual smoke test on a fresh shell after `brew bundle install`. No commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "set -e; brew bundle list --file=./Brewfile --all | grep -qx gnupg; brew bundle list --file=./Brewfile --all | grep -qx openssh; dev=$(comm -23 <(grep -E '^(brew|cask) ' Brewfile | sort -u) <(grep -E '^(brew|cask) ' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/Brewfile | sort -u)); [ -z \"$dev\" ]; zsh -n zsh/.zshrc; diff <(grep -v 'colima/ssh_config' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/ssh/config) ssh/config; echo AUDIT CLEAN", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Brewfile parses and lists gnupg + openssh", "no brew/cask deviations vs upstream", "zsh -n passes", "ssh/config differs only by Colima Include"]}
```
